overall.description: First-person walk through a rainy futuristic city street at night, featuring neon-lit buildings, digital billboards, and pedestrians with umbrellas. The footage appears to be from a video game (Cyberpunk 2077), transitioning from a covered walkway to an open wet pavement with reflective surfaces.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian walkway with digital advertising

agents.ego_description: walking steadily under the building overhang along the dry sidewalk

notable_agents.action: seated on bench looking at handheld device
pedestrian in red outfit walking away from camera

entered.detail: large vertical digital screen displaying COMBAT advertisement with male figure
concrete bench with two seated characters under the billboard
dark architectural overhang providing shelter from rain
tall building with reflective glass windows and orange accent lighting
tall palm trees visible in the distance along the street

segments.scene_description: Walking under a covered pedestrian walkway with dry concrete pavement. A large digital billboard displaying a COMBAT advertisement dominates the left side, with a bench below where NPCs are seated. The building overhang on the right provides shelter, while palm trees are visible in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: open rainy city sidewalk with reflective wet pavement

events.description: exits covered walkway into open rain, pavement becomes wet and reflective
close pass by pedestrian with purple umbrella temporarily fills frame

agents.ego_description: walking through open rain passing pedestrians with illuminated umbrellas

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in red bodysuit carrying red umbrella walking towards camera
pedestrian with patterned umbrella and colorful outfit walking towards camera

entered.detail: rain-slicked concrete reflecting neon lights and street illumination
yellow and white striped barriers lining the edge of the sidewalk

segments.scene_description: Transitioning from the dry covered area into the open rain, the pavement becomes wet and highly reflective. The camera passes pedestrians carrying illuminated umbrellas walking in the opposite direction, including a close encounter with a character holding a purple umbrella. Street barriers line the left side of the path.

scene_state.functional_zone: rainy urban street with palm trees and sidewalk barriers

agents.ego_description: continuing down the wet sidewalk approaching distant pedestrians

notable_agents.action: group of pedestrians with umbrellas walking ahead in the distance

segments.scene_description: Continuing down the rain-soaked sidewalk with the building overhang now on the right side. The combat billboard is no longer visible, and the glass facade building recedes into the distance. Palm trees become more prominent along the left side as the camera approaches a group of pedestrians ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: neon-lit rainy street with increasing pedestrian density

events.description: camera begins following pedestrian in yellow pants walking ahead

agents.ego_description: following a pedestrian in yellow pants while approaching a denser crowd ahead

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in yellow pants and white jacket walking ahead of camera
pedestrian with green umbrella and glowing outfit walking ahead

segments.scene_description: Walking behind a pedestrian wearing yellow pants and a white jacket who is moving in the same direction. The street barriers continue along the left side receding into the distance. The crowd density increases ahead with multiple pedestrians carrying umbrellas visible in the neon-lit rain.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person movement from a sheltered urban walkway into a rain-drenched, neon-lit city street. It begins under a dry concrete overhang dominated by a large digital combat advertisement and a bench of seated pedestrians, with distant palm trees visible ahead. As the camera moves forward, it transitions from the dry shelter into the open rain, where the pavement becomes highly reflective and the path is crowded with pedestrians carrying illuminated umbrellas. The scene then shifts as the building overhang recedes to the right and the combat billboard disappears, leaving the camera to navigate a rain-soaked sidewalk lined with street barriers and prominent palm trees. Finally, the camera follows a pedestrian in yellow pants and a white jacket, moving deeper into a dense, glowing crowd of umbrella-bearing figures under the city lights.
